name: Fried Ice Cream Volcanos
recipeIngredient: 1 cup graham crackers or vanilla wafers (finely crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place well-formed ice cream balls in a metal square pan. Cover with foil and set in freezer for at least 3 hours.
2. In a small shallow dish, combine crushed graham crackers and cinnamon. Quickly roll the firm ice cream balls into the crumbs, replacing them in the pan, and freeze again for 1-3 hours.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg and milk until frothy. Quickly roll the coated ice cream balls in the egg mixture, then back into the crumbs. Return to freezer for an additional 1-3 hours.
4. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C). Ensure precise oil temperature so the ice cream will fry quickly without melting.
5. Fry the coated ice cream balls until the coating begins to brown for 8-10 seconds on each side. Remove and place in a serving dish.
6. For the lava effect, soak sugar cubes in alcohol-based orange extract or brandy for 15 minutes. When ready to serve, press a sugar cube into the top of the ice cream and ignite.
